# AECoercePtrUPP

**Type Alias**

Defines a data type for the universal procedure pointer for the `AECoercePtrProcPtr` callback function pointer.

## Declaration

```swift
typealias AECoercePtrUPP = AECoercePtrProcPtr
```

## Discussion

For a description of a coerce pointer callback function, see [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/coreservices/aecoerceptrprocptr].
title: AECoercePtrUPP
